name: marvkr/better-design
description: Open-source design systems for shadcn/ui. 27 themed component libraries (Linear, Airbnb, Stripe, Vercel, Notion, Apple, Supabase, Figma, and more). Install any component with one command.

name: wtfzambo/spotme
description: Gym mode for agentic coding. OpenCode plugin that scaffolds exercises and reviews your work. Keep your edge.

name: talentsache/aipointer
description: The AI cursor companion. Hold a key, ask a question, get an answer about whatever your cursor is pointing at. Vision LLM overlay for macOS, Windows, Linux. Multi-provider (OpenRouter, Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini). Voice in/out. MIT licensed. No telemetry.

name: sghy1717/susurration
description: Agent-to-agent signal network

name: maartenkeizer/dither-avatar
description: Deterministic dithered SVG avatars from any seed string. Zero dependencies.

name: DenisSergeevitch/chatgpt-portal
description: Local browser bridge for exposing sanitized authenticated page snapshots to ChatGPT via Cloudflare Tunnel.
